data.content: Plan: remove the clipped overview rail and replace it with a tab-strip stale-beats cue; implement a dialog/lightbox that loads stale beats sorted by updated-age descending; add bulk controls for Select all, Oldest five/select fewer, and Clear; show the default dispatch model plus override options from configured agents; display queued/running/review status; preserve overview matrix responsiveness with no nested page cards; browser-test default in-app viewport and dialog interactions.
